name: Alex Candidate
summary: Customer-focused IT support professional with 4+ years keeping users productive across Windows, Microsoft 365 and Active Directory environments. Comfortable owning tickets end-to-end and growing into cybersecurity.

work_history.title: IT Support Technician
responsibilities: Resolve level 1/2 tickets in ServiceNow for 600+ staff across Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365
Administer Active Directory accounts, group policy and password resets
Image and deploy laptops, manage hardware lifecycle and asset register
achievements: Cut average ticket resolution time by 30% by writing a knowledge base of common fixes
Led the rollout of MFA across the organisation

work_history.title: Help Desk Analyst
responsibilities: First point of contact for IT issues via phone and email
Troubleshot networking faults (DNS, DHCP, VPN) and escalated complex incidents
Documented solutions and maintained the IT knowledge base

education: Diploma of Information Technology, Victoria Polytechnic (2020)
projects: Home lab: Active Directory + Microsoft Sentinel SIEM for hands-on SOC practice
cover_letter_style: Warm, direct and confident. Short paragraphs. Opens with genuine enthusiasm for the specific company, gives one concrete example of impact, and closes with a clear call to chat.
career_story: I started on the help desk because I love solving problems for people, and I've been steadily deepening my technical skills toward a cybersecurity career.
motivations: I want to join a team where I can keep learning, take on more security responsibility, and have a clear path to grow.
